result.stdout:
Executing EnovationCloud.CommandLine (4.26.2.20004) from...
    /tmp/inspectra-help-enovationcloud.commandline-4.26.2-zzz-develop.4-aaec9ea1621442649701f81c3552858c/tool/EnovationCloud.CommandLine

With Arguments...
    --help 

Usage: EnovationCloud.CommandLine --COMMAND [<ARGS>]

Available in SparkCommands (EnovationCloud.CommandLine)

     --CreateSparkManifest: 
            [WorkingDirectory] Folder To Process - Will Create a ReleaseName.release.json file
            [ReleaseName] Name of Release
            [Version] Optional Version of Release

     --UploadToSpark: 
            [WorkingDirectory] Uploads Application Package to Spark - Should include 1 or more *.release.json files
            [Url] Spark URL to Upload Files To
            [Login] Spark Login.
            [Password] Spark Password.
            [Version] Override the Version in Release Files with this version.

     --DownloadFromSpark: 
            [Url] Spark URL to Download Files From
            [Login] Spark Login.
            [Password] Spark Password.
            [DownloadFolder] Folder to place downloads. All Files in the Manifest will be downloaded to the folder.
            [ChannelName] Release Name to Download.
            [ChannelVersion] Version to Download.
            [FileName] File to Download (leave empty to download all items).

    --help 

Usage: EnovationCloud.CommandLine --COMMAND [<ARGS>]

Available in SparkCommands (EnovationCloud.CommandLine)

     --CreateSparkManifest: 
            [WorkingDirectory] Folder To Process - Will Create a ReleaseName.release.json file
            [ReleaseName] Name of Release
            [Version] Optional Version of Release

     --UploadToSpark: 
            [WorkingDirectory] Uploads Application Package to Spark - Should include 1 or more *.release.json files
            [Url] Spark URL to Upload Files To
            [Login] Spark Login.
            [Password] Spark Password.
            [Version] Override the Version in Release Files with this version.

     --DownloadFromSpark: 
            [Url] Spark URL to Download Files From
            [Login] Spark Login.
            [Password] Spark Password.
            [DownloadFolder] Folder to place downloads. All Files in the Manifest will be downloaded to the folder.
            [ChannelName] Release Name to Download.
            [ChannelVersion] Version to Download.
            [FileName] File to Download (leave empty to download all items).
